# Horizon Care Services

> Healthcare staffing agency supplying registered nurses, social workers, occupational therapists, physiotherapists, healthcare assistants, and support workers to NHS trusts, local authorities, and care organisations across England. Company No. 14615041.

Horizon Care Services is a professional healthcare staffing agency with three years of operating experience. We work with NHS trusts, local authorities, and care organisations across Bedfordshire, Buckinghamshire, Cambridgeshire, Hertfordshire, Manchester, London, and broader England.

Our practice is built on three principles: careful selection of the professionals we place; joined-up working alongside NHS teams, social workers, and commissioning partners; and honest communication about what we can and cannot deliver.

## Services

- [Healthcare Staffing](https://www.horizoncareservices.org/services/): Registered nurses (RGN, RMN, RNLD), healthcare assistants, support workers, social workers, occupational therapists, and physiotherapists. Available for single shifts, long-term contracts, and short-notice cover around the clock.

## About

- [About Horizon Care Services](https://www.horizoncareservices.org/about/): Background, approach, and information for NHS and local authority commissioning teams.
- [Commission Services](https://www.horizoncareservices.org/referrals/): How NHS trusts, local authorities, and care organisations can commission our services. We respond within 2 working days.
- [Work For Us](https://www.horizoncareservices.org/work-for-us/): Join our register — flexible agency work for nurses, allied health professionals, and support workers across England.

## Writing

- [Blog](https://www.horizoncareservices.org/blog/): Articles and guidance for referrers and healthcare professionals.
- [Home Care vs Care Home: Understanding the Difference](https://www.horizoncareservices.org/blog/home-care-vs-care-home/): Plain-English guide to the difference between home care and a care home placement.

## Contact

- Phone: 020 3757 2767 (Monday–Friday, 9am–5pm)
- WhatsApp: 020 3757 2767 (7 days a week)

- Office: 475B Cheetham Hill Road, Cheetham Hill, Manchester, M8 9LR
- Service areas: Bedfordshire, Buckinghamshire, Cambridgeshire, Hertfordshire, Manchester, London — and broader England on request
